structuredContent.message: Counterparty GCoJB3pVSeSwrky3FkHQcXxEj61XyeBWxpFWYtXTFp5o is not registered in the Quantu agent registry.
structuredContent.hint: Ask the counterparty to register via TrustGate (any tool that calls `init_policy` will do so as part of its bootstrap), or pick a counterparty from `agenttrust_demo_state.counterparties` for testing.
